prompt: Create a dramatic dark fantasy anime illustration of a single female sorceress or queen, shown from the waist up and positioned slightly right of center, leaving heavy negative space on the left. She has long golden blonde hair with a thick front braid, sharp bangs, pale skin, and intense glowing hot magenta eyes staring directly at the viewer with a calm, intimidating expression. She wears an ornate black, teal, and bronze armored bodice with off-shoulder teal shoulder pieces, gold filigree lines, a black choker with a teal diamond ornament, and a bright magenta jewel at the center of her chest. Add a large angular translucent black veil or wing-like mantle framing her head and body, outlined with thin bronze-gold geometric trim, plus a sharp turquoise crystalline crown or horned tiara across her forehead. The setting is an abstract shadowy cavern or battlefield made of deep navy-black darkness and blood-red fractured shapes, with red glowing cracks and painterly shards behind her. Use a high-contrast cinematic composition, moody red and cyan rim lighting, glossy metallic highlights, intricate linework, and polished Japanese anime concept-art style. Keep the image text-free, with exactly one character, no extra figures, no visible watermark, and a 4:3 horizontal canvas.
